chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No D-3546 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case. 1. For Order on M.A No.16423/2024 2. For order on office objection No.13 3. For Order on M.A No.15515/2024 4. For hearing of main case 09.08.2024. Mr. Saud Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3-4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner has been heard. It appears that essentially the grievance of the Petitioner is that a wine shop is being operated in contravention of the terms of the license granted by the Excise and Taxation Department. It has been pleaded that a complaint has been made in the matter to the competent authority, but has not been attended to. However, on a query posed, learned counsel concedes that since the time of the filing of this Petition, a response has been received whereby the Petitioner has been called upon to appear before the competent authority for purpose of advancing his cause. That being so, with the Petition stands dismissed along with the pending miscellaneous application while directing the Petitioner to pursue the matter before the concerned department. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PA
